# Q3 dedup distinct (src,dst) pairs (network beaconing)

**Dataset**: `xdr_data`

C2 beaconing detection — find steady-cadence connections to a single destination. Q3 dedup distinct (src,dst) pairs.

```sql
dataset = xdr_data | filter event_type = ENUM.NETWORK and action_local_ip != null and action_remote_ip != null | fields action_local_ip, action_remote_ip | dedup action_local_ip, action_remote_ip | sort asc action_local_ip | limit 30
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (returned 30). From the 20-scenario XQL coverage program; technique is dataset-portable._
